name: Anytime Golf
about: Anytime Golf is an indoor golf facility with locations in Richmond and Charlottesville, Virginia. They operate as a members-only club equipped with three state-of-the-art practice bays featuring TrackMan4 simulators. This technology allows for year-round practice and play, providing real-time data on swing mechanics, ball flight, and putting analysis. The facility is designed for golfers seeking a private, dedicated space to improve their game with professional-grade technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade TrackMan4 technology for detailed swing and shot analysis
24/7 member access for flexible practice and playing times
A private, exclusive environment without the crowds of a public range
Option to play on over 200 virtual golf courses from around the world
Availability of one-on-one professional coaching to improve skills

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available.
No information on alcohol service available. BYOB policy is not mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three bays equipped with TrackMan4 simulators, providing radar-based launch monitoring and shot tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify, but it is standard practice for golfers to bring their own clubs to use with the simulators. Club rentals are listed as an amenity, suggesting they may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information on a food and drink service or a policy on outside food and drinks. The venue appears to focus on the golf experience rather than dining.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing a full 18 holes on the simulators. The duration can vary based on the course and number of players in a bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information indicating that the venue is designed for or welcomes children. The focus appears to be on adult golfers and serious practice.
